Email GitHub Google Scholar LinkedIn

Diba Hadi Esfangereh

Undergraduate ·

I’m an undergraduate researcher in Computer Engineering at Sharif University of Technology (minor in Mathematics). My primary focus is computational music generation and NIME, especially culturally grounded modeling of musical structure and expressivity. I also work on statistical learning and AI—probabilistic modeling and controllable generation.

“To play a wrong note is insignificant; to play without passion is inexcusable.” — Ludwig van Beethoven

Featured Publications

Persian Musical Instruments Classification Using Polyphonic Data Augmentation
NeurIPS 2025 Workshop on AI for Music · 2025
Persian MusicGen: A Large-Scale Dataset and Culturally-Aware Generative Model for Persian Music
2026
Click to place notes · Click a note to remove

Research Interests

Computational music generation & NIME
Culturally grounded modeling of musical structure and expressivity.
Statistical learning & AI
Probabilistic modeling and controllable generation algorithms.
